sprint: Vihu Card Platform v1 -- redeemed theme vanished on every hard refresh
task: A real, user-reported bug found via live testing on the deployed site: a Card-redeemed Theme disappeared on every hard refresh. Root cause traced, not guessed: registerRedeemedTheme deliberately never caches the theme's own content to localStorage, relying entirely on _rehydrateRedeemed() to re-fetch it fresh from the owner's Personal Repository on every boot -- but that function was called from inside js/themeRegistry.js's own self-initializing top-level code, and index.html loads themeRegistry.js BEFORE themeRepositoryClient.js, so window.ThemeRepositoryClient was always undefined at that exact moment and the function's own defensive guard silently no-oped on literally every single boot. Fixed by exporting rehydrateRedeemed from ThemeRegistry's API and triggering it from js/app.js's boot sequence instead -- the same place, timed the same way, refreshFromRepository() already runs from, guaranteeing both scripts are loaded by then regardless of tag order. A second robustness gap found while verifying: _refreshRepositoryWithTimeout()'s call was never wrapped in try/catch, so a synchronous throw from a partial ThemeRepositoryClient would have aborted the rest of the boot function -- including the new rehydrate call right after it; fixed with a try/catch. Verified via a new Playwright test performing a real page.reload() after seeding the real redeemedGrants localStorage key -- failed exactly as reported before the fix, passes after. A deeper, disclosed limitation was raised directly by the user and confirmed rather than dismissed: this fix guarantees rehydration runs, but a redeemed theme's survival still depends entirely on the redeemer's own disposable Supabase anonymous session persisting in that browser -- Creator has no user-account system at all, so private browsing, cleared site data, or a different device/browser still permanently loses the grant. Explicitly decided to leave this as a disclosed limitation for now, matching this codebase's own existing precedent for Personal Repository/Cloud Backup. Full regression across the entire existing Creator/Card-Platform Playwright suite and both goldenBuild.js suites passes unchanged. See CLAUDE.md's matching entry for the full account.
